# ng-animated-icons llms.txt reference

This file is a quick machine-readable reference for `ng-animated-icons`.

## Project snapshot

- Package name: `ng-animated-icons`
- Homepage: `https://icons.ajitpanigrahi.com/`
- Repository: `https://github.com/ajitzero/animated-icons`
- Framework: Angular standalone components (signals-first)
- Peer dependency: `@angular/core` `^19.0.0 || ^20.0.0 || ^21.0.0`
- License: MIT

## Installation

Install with your package manager:

- `npm i ng-animated-icons`
- `pnpm i ng-animated-icons`
- `yarn add ng-animated-icons`
- `bun add ng-animated-icons`

## Basic usage

Import icons from the package root:

- `import { ActivityIcon, StarIcon } from 'ng-animated-icons';`

Use icon selectors in templates:

- `<i-activity />`
- `<i-star />`

Naming conventions:

- Import names are PascalCase and end in `Icon`.
- Template selectors are lowercase and prefixed with `i-`.
- Example: `ThumbsUpIcon` => `<i-thumbs-up />`.

## Props

Each icon component supports:

- `color: string` (default `currentColor`)
- `size: number` (default `24`)
- `strokeWidth: number` (default `2`)
- `class: string` (optional)
- `animate: boolean` (default `false`)

## Global configuration

Set default icon props globally:

- `provideAnimatedIcons({ color, size, strokeWidth })`

## Warnings and pitfalls

- Keep icon options immutable when updating state (prefer replacing objects/signals over mutating nested fields).
- For animation interactions (hover/focus/touch), bind `animate` to explicit UI state.
- Prefer running frequent animation triggers outside Angular zone when wiring custom animation engines.
- Keep accessibility in mind: always pair icons with labels/text/ARIA when used as interactive controls.
- Do not assume all historical docs list exactly the same icon count; always derive export names from source for current branch/version.

## Development notes

- Local docs app: `bunx nx serve docs`
- Build docs: `bunx nx build docs`
- Build library: `bunx nx build ng-animated-icons`

## Animated icon import names (alphabetical)

Source of truth: exports detected from `packages/animated-icons/src/icons/*.ts` on current branch.

Total currently exported icon import names: **507** (this satisfies “at least 500”).
